description: Invoice with itemized table. Tests OCR variant agreement on decimal numbers (comma vs dot), line merging, confidence scoring.

expectations.comment_convergence: High agreement on invariant lines like invoice number, dates, itemized rows
expectations.comment_ambiguity: Minor variants in decimal format (45,50 vs 45.50) and support line text (Support & Maintenance vs Support and Maint.)
expectations.comment_status: Converged on main items but ambiguous on formatting details

key_assertions.comment: Line item unanimous despite surrounding variation
Two variants use comma, one uses dot. Normalized form is unified.
Rotated variant abbreviates; still recognizes the row
Rotated says TOTAL instead. Lower confidence on this line.

regression_notes: If convergence_score_bps < 7000, OCR pre-processing changed. If ambiguity_score_bps > 3000, formatter is too strict.
